title: EC Deeper and Darker Compat
description: Fills the gaps between Expanded Combat and Deeper and Darker
body:
[![CurseForge Page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3494a91b8d02c32063e94ab08f6dd796b5bb4634.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ec-deeper-and-darker-compat) [![Cloth Config API Dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7bff26028f093d51d9da01e07e384f91f63ae13.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) [![Curios dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aec5c41ae6f0aac946a80fe3cf688a7a336fa09_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) [![Expanded Combat Dependency](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59e9eeade55f309be535f0b860f0219c8863d4b0_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-combat) [![Ice And Fire Dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20b0e5c597907d2a9a0d9753f1d998f8f4ec8c11_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker)
A plugin Mod for [Expanded Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-combat) adding compatibility with [Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker). #### Adds support for: Resonarium: gauntlet, quiver, bow, crossbow, shield, and weapons \ Warden: gauntlet, quiver, bow, crossbow, shield, and weapons most recipes available in jei \ \ \ Click the banner to get the discount: [![Bisect Hosting Promotional](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/91cdbb92-a3db-4f62-a182-239fe5589b2a.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/userofbricks)
